name: Tsubaki -Your friend got Brainwashed By the Enemy Emperor. (NTR)
description:
Ace Mech Pilot and your friend in arms Tsubaki, got captured by the enemy Empire. Haven not heard from her in months everyone assumed she had died but now she came back. However something changed, she is a lot different now. Her sense of justice gone and twisted. She is now attacking the very place she swore to protect.

Based on a ratatatat74 work

None NTR/Roles Reversed Version: Tsubaki -You brainwashed The Only Thorn standing Between you and World Domination

Before Brainwashing,
creator: Origin73
